codes.term: Malignant hypertension complicating AND/OR reason for care during childbirth (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension complicating childbirth, a pregnancy-specific context; primary hypertension codes should not be pregnancy-contextualized variants.

codes.term: Eclampsia with pre-existing hypertension in childbirth (disorder)
codes.rationale: Eclampsia with pre-existing hypertension is a pregnancy complication, not a primary hypertension code.

codes.term: Pre-existing hypertensive heart and chronic kidney disease in mother complicating childbirth (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertensive heart and kidney disease complicating childbirth, a pregnancy-specific manifestation.

codes.term: Pre-existing hypertensive heart disease in mother complicating childbirth (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertensive heart disease complicating childbirth, a pregnancy-specific context.

codes.term: Pre-existing hypertensive heart disease in mother complicating pregnancy (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertensive heart disease complicating pregnancy, a pregnancy-specific context.

codes.term: Hypertension secondary to renal disease in obstetric context (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is secondary hypertension due to renal disease in obstetric context, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Pre-existing hypertensive chronic kidney disease in mother complicating pregnancy (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertensive chronic kidney disease complicating pregnancy, a pregnancy-specific context.

codes.term: Hypertension due to congenital adrenal hyperplasia (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is secondary hypertension due to congenital adrenal hyperplasia, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Secondary hypertension due to renal tubular disorder (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is secondary hypertension due to renal tubular disorder, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Secondary hypertension due to congenital heart disorder (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is secondary hypertension due to congenital heart disorder, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Renovascular hypertension (disorder)
codes.rationale: Renovascular hypertension is secondary hypertension due to renal artery disease, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Goldblatt hypertension (disorder)
codes.rationale: Goldblatt hypertension is secondary hypertension due to renal artery stenosis, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension concurrent and due to end stage renal disease on dialysis due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension secondary to end-stage renal disease due to diabetes, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension concurrent and due to end stage renal disease on dialysis due to type 1 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension secondary to end-stage renal disease due to diabetes, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension in chronic kidney disease stage 5 due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension secondary to chronic kidney disease due to diabetes, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension in chronic kidney disease stage 4 due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension secondary to chronic kidney disease due to diabetes, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension in chronic kidney disease stage 3 due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: This is hypertension secondary to chronic kidney disease due to diabetes, not primary hypertension.

codes.term: Hypertension in chronic kidney disease stage 2 due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
